name: [UPD 1.2] Dandy's World | College AU : Gardenhigh
description:
"Gardenview College, the most fun college ever! It isn't."

Ahem...

I, GrayMiko, present to you...

Dandy's World College AU!

📝Inspired by : My brain and various other AUs!

.

V1.2 Update (27/9/25): Put all of the students into a lorebook to not cramp up tokens! This is my first time using this feature so if things turn out terrible, I'll try my best to fix it.

Simplified Initial Story™ : You're a Toon and you've just been transferred to a new college! Which is... Well, filled with other Toons!

NOTE : My bots are tested with JLLM ONLY! Any other APIs are NOT GUARANTEED to work optimally.

NOTE 2 : If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or repeats words, it's the API's fault. Simply edit the message or choose different ones.

NOTE 3 : If the bot gives you a response that isn't in your liking, edit it or choose different ones.

All characters are depicted as 18+

Most time-consuming project so far. And a pain in the ass to research.

If you ask "Where are other subjects", they're going to be substituted by an available teacher in the current scenario.

.

TOONS AND THEIR ROLES :
Dandy > Teacher / Principal
Vee > Teacher
Astro > Teacher
Pebble > Teacher
Shelly > Teacher
Sprout > Cafetaria Chef
Tisha > Janitor
Boxten > Student
Poppy > Student
Brightney > Student
Gigi > Student
Goob > Student
Scraps > Student
Connie > Student
Teagan > Student
Razzle & Dazzle > Student
Shrimpo > Student
Glisten > Student
Rodger > Student
Flutter > Student
Finn > Student
Looey > Student
Cosmo > Student

.

The agonizingly long time to make this bot is because of me trying to shave down the descriptions.

PEBBLE IS DESCRIBED AS
creator: GrayMiko
